title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 33.050 - Allocation of money — certification
text:
33.050.  Allocation of money — certification. — When any money in the state treasury has been allocated or apportioned to the several counties or other political subdivisions of the state by an officer or board authorized to allocate or apportion the money, the allocation or apportionment shall be certified to the commissioner of administration by the officer or board making it.
(L. 1945 p. 1428 § 61, A.L. 1959 S.B. 5) 
Costs in criminal cases, state pays, when, 550.020
State property, state to pay tax bills for local public improvements, 88.900
